final_plan:
#Task1: Identify the relevant sensors for monitoring chiller trip failure for POKMAIN chiller 6.
#Agent1: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: List of relevant sensors for chiller trip failure.

#Task2: Determine the temporal behavior of the identified sensors when chiller trip failure occurs.
#Agent2: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Temporal behavior of the relevant sensors.

#Task3: Retrieve historical sensor data for POKMAIN chiller 6 for the relevant sensors.
#Agent3: IoT Data Download
#Dependency3: #S1
#ExpectedOutput3: Historical sensor data for the relevant sensors.

#Task4: Analyze the retrieved historical data to identify any anomalies or patterns related to chiller trip failure.
#Agent4: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency4: #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: Anomaly detection and pattern analysis for chiller trip failure.
